'''donaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicklike|hicklike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicklike|hicklike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| donaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:donarithi|donarithi]] || [[word:donariji|donariji]] || [[word:donarishi|donarishi]] || [[word:donariki|donariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:donaruthuthu|donaruthuthu]] || [[word:donarujuju|donarujuju]] || [[word:donarushushu|donarushushu]] || [[word:donarukuku|donarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:donaruthu|donaruthu]] || [[word:donaruju|donaruju]] || [[word:donarushu|donarushu]] || [[word:donaruku|donaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:donarufthuf|donarufthuf]] || [[word:donarufjuf|donarufjuf]] || [[word:donarufshuf|donarufshuf]] || [[word:donarufkuf|donarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:donarethe|donarethe]] || [[word:donareje|donareje]] || [[word:donareshe|donareshe]] || [[word:donareke|donareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:donarothotho|donarothotho]] || [[word:donarojojo|donarojojo]] || [[word:donaroshosho|donaroshosho]] || [[word:donarokoko|donarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:donarotho|donarotho]] || [[word:donarojo|donarojo]] || [[word:donarosho|donarosho]] || [[word:donaroko|donaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:donarofthof|donarofthof]] || [[word:donarofjof|donarofjof]] || [[word:donarofshof|donarofshof]] || [[word:donarofkof|donarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:donarÃŸfthÃŸf|donarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfjÃŸf|donarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfshÃŸf|donarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfkÃŸf|donarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:donarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|donarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|donarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|donarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|donarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:donarÃŸfthÃŸf|donarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfjÃŸf|donarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfshÃŸf|donarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfkÃŸf|donarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:donarÃŸfthÃŸf|donarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfjÃŸf|donarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfshÃŸf|donarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:donarÃŸfkÃŸf|donarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:donarÃḊthÃḊ|donarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:donarÃḊjÃḊ|donarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:donarÃḊshÃḊ|donarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:donarÃḊkÃḊ|donarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:donarathatha|donarathatha]] || [[word:donarajaja|donarajaja]] || [[word:donarashasha|donarashasha]] || [[word:donarakaka|donarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:donaratha|donaratha]] || [[word:donaraja|donaraja]] || [[word:donarasha|donarasha]] || [[word:donaraka|donaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:donarafthaf|donarafthaf]] || [[word:donarafjaf|donarafjaf]] || [[word:donarafshaf|donarafshaf]] || [[word:donarafkaf|donarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:donarasha|donarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:donarshÃḋsha|donarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donarosha|donarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donarmusha|donarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:donaryasha|donaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonarnkshÃḋsha|godonarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonarnkrosha|godonarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonarnkmusha|godonarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonarnkyasha|godonarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:donanarasha|donanarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:donanarshÃḋsha|donanarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donanarosha|donanarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donanarmusha|donanarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:donanaryasha|donanaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonanarnkshÃḋsha|godonanarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonanarnkrosha|godonanarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonanarnkmusha|godonanarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonanarnkyasha|godonanarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:denÃḊrasha|denÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:denÃḊrshÃḋsha|denÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:denÃḊrosha|denÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:denÃḊrmusha|denÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:denÃḊryasha|denÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godenÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|godenÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godenÃḊrnkrosha|godenÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godenÃḊrnkmusha|godenÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godenÃḊrnkyasha|godenÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:donfarasha|donfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:donfarshÃḋsha|donfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donfarosha|donfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donfarmusha|donfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:donfaryasha|donfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonfarnkshÃḋsha|godonfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonfarnkrosha|godonfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonfarnkmusha|godonfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonfarnkyasha|godonfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
